hook: Emotional sturdiness comes from tolerating uncertainty without converting it into cynicism.
body: The temptation after a few bad experiences is to become sarcastic, detached, or contemptuous, but that costs you the very openness you need.

hook: Bitterness can feel protective while quietly making you less attractive, less generous, and less observant.
body: Stay discerning without becoming hard; standards and openness can coexist.

hook: Stay discerning without becoming hard; standards and openness can coexist.
body: You can notice flaky behavior and still remain respectful rather than sliding into resentment theater.

hook: You can notice flaky behavior and still remain respectful rather than sliding into resentment theater.
body: When you catch yourself turning one bad experience into a broad story about dating, pause and rewrite the thought more honestly.
